DEMURRER

MATTHEW W. MCALEER, ESQ. COLANTUONO, HIGHSMITH & WHATLEY, PC (707) 986-8091 mmcaleer@chwlaw.us Attorney for Petitioner and Plaintiff CALIFORNIA GAMING ASSOCIATION

JAMES G. WAIAN, ESQ., Deputy Attorney General (619) 738-9335 James.Waian@doj.ca.gov Attorney for California Gambling Control Commission and Bureau of Gambling Control

hearing is held. ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

RESPONDENT CALIFORNIA GAMBLING CONTROL COMMISSION, CALIFORNIA BUREAU OF GAMBLING CONTROL DEMURRER. After hearing oral argument, Court takes the matter under submission.
